message:
feat(db): release_reservations_by_ids_returning_ids and search cache authorization keying

Add release_reservations_by_ids_returning_ids() which returns the exact
list of IDs that were newly released, rather than just a count. The
existing release_reservations_by_ids() now delegates to the new function
for consistency.

In the search service, introduce cache_authorization_discriminator() and
default_scope_context() to include the viewer identity, approved contacts,
sender policies, recipient map, and redaction policy in the search cache
key. Without this, differently-scoped or differently-redacted search
responses could collide in the cache and be replayed to the wrong viewer.
The discriminator normalizes ordering (sort + dedup) so equivalent scope
contexts hash identically regardless of input order.

Also fix formatting of several .collect() calls that had broken
indentation from a prior refactor.

Tests:
- release_reservations_by_ids_returning_ids omits already-released rows
- build_search_cache_key distinguishes authorization contexts
- build_search_cache_key is order-invariant for equivalent scope contexts
- build_search_cache_key distinguishes redaction policies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
